The change is subtle:
- id=29 (G, bottom bar) went from 64 pixels to 63 pixels
- New id=30 (c, 1 pixel) appeared
So clicking on the gray container didn't change the game objects - just the timer bar (id=29) lost one pixel, and a new charcoal pixel appeared. This is likely just a timer/step counter decreasing.
Let me try clicking on different objects. The game seems to involve matching or moving colored items into containers. Let me look at the structure more carefully:
- id=9: gray container with green contents (N/light green inside)
- id=18: gray container with yellow contents (Y/yellow inside)
- id=2: light green (N) with red dot - this might need to go into container id=9
- id=16: yellow (Y) with red dot - this might need to go into container id=18
Let me try clicking on the light green object (id=2) to see if it moves into the green container.
